summary: Gold-Pass, Stoked Credits, and Elite Groms Leaderboard testing complete. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. All P0 and P1 features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Gold-Pass availability logic correctly implemented in photographer.py lines 598-680
Credit payment uses CREDIT_TO_USD_RATE = 100 (100 credits = $1) correctly
Elite Groms leaderboard filters by elite_tier='grom_rising' when elite_only=true
Grom HQ elite rankings correctly calculates percentile based on XP ranking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gold-Pass, Stoked Credits, and Elite Groms features fully tested. Key files: /app/backend/routes/photographer.py (Gold-Pass availability lines 598-680), /app/backend/routes/subscriptions.py (credit payment lines 710-920), /app/backend/routes/leaderboard.py (Elite Groms lines 418-560). Constants: GOLD_PASS_BOOKING_WINDOW_HOURS=2, CREDIT_TO_USD_RATE=100.

P0_gold_pass_availability_lock_fields.details: GET /api/photographer/{id}/availability returns is_locked, unlock_time, unlock_minutes_remaining for non-Gold users

P0_credit_payment_insufficient_balance.details: POST /api/subscriptions/pay-with-credits/{user_id} returns insufficient_credits=true when balance too low
P0_credit_payment_insufficient_balance.test_evidence: test_pay_with_credits_insufficient_balance passed - returns credits_required, current_balance, credits_needed, dollars_needed

P0_credit_payment_info_calculation.test_evidence: test_credit_payment_info_returns_credits_required, test_credit_payment_info_tier_3_premium passed - tier_2 ($4.99) = 499 credits, tier_3 ($14.99) = 1499 credits

P0_elite_groms_leaderboard.details: GET /api/leaderboard/elite-groms returns Groms ranked by XP with correct structure

P0_elite_groms_filter.details: GET /api/leaderboard/elite-groms?elite_only=true filters to only grom_rising elite_tier
P0_elite_groms_filter.test_evidence: test_elite_groms_elite_only_filter passed - 3 competitive Groms returned with elite_tier='grom_rising'

P1_grom_hq_elite_rankings.details: GET /api/leaderboard/grom-hq/{parent_id}/elite-rankings returns linked Grom rankings with percentile
P1_grom_hq_elite_rankings.test_evidence: test_grom_hq_elite_rankings_endpoint, test_grom_hq_elite_rankings_entry_structure passed - returns current_rank, total_groms, percentile

response.message: Insufficient credits. You need 1499 more credits ($14.99) to upgrade.
